# BestHO3 — California Homeowners (HO-3) Insurance

> BestHO3.com is an independent-broker homeowners insurance resource operated by WJB Services, Inc. dba Bollinsure Insurance Services (California Department of Insurance License #6013787), licensed in all 50 states. It provides a comprehensive guide to homeowners insurance with a California focus, and a fast HO-3 pricing indication that a licensed broker turns into bindable coverage.

## What this site is
- A comprehensive, plain-English guide to homeowners insurance, written for California homeowners but generally applicable nationwide.
- A pricing-indication wizard that produces a preliminary annual premium range and, when the applicant is ready, generates and e-signs a completed ACORD 80 Homeowner Application for broker submission.
- An independent brokerage: we shop admitted carriers, the California FAIR Plan, and surplus-lines (E&S) markets — we do not work for one carrier.

## Policy forms covered
- HO-3 (special form) — the standard owner-occupied homeowners policy; open-perils on the dwelling, named-perils on contents. This site's primary focus.
- HO-5 (comprehensive form) — broader open-perils coverage on both dwelling and contents; higher cost, better value for higher-value or well-maintained homes. See https://www.bestho5.com.
- DP-3 (dwelling fire, special form) — for landlords and non-owner-occupied / investment properties. See /landlord-dp3.

## Key pages
- / — homepage + HO-3 pricing indication wizard
- /california-homeowners-insurance — the comprehensive guide
- /ho3-vs-ho5 — HO-3 vs HO-5 comparison
- /landlord-dp3 — landlords & investment property (DP-3)
- /cost — what drives a California homeowners premium
- /coverage — what an HO-3 policy covers (Coverages A–F)
- /california-fair-plan — the FAIR Plan and wildfire-risk market of last resort
- /carriers — carrier and market access
- /faq — common questions, answered by a licensed broker
- /glossary — 60 homeowners insurance terms in plain English

## Contact
- Brokerage: quotes@bollinsure.com / 310-804-5017
- Firm: WJB Services, Inc. dba Bollinsure Insurance Services, CA DOI License #6013787

## Important
All pricing indications are preliminary estimates subject to underwriting, carrier eligibility, market appetite, and policy terms. They are not a quote, binder, or guarantee of coverage or final premium. This site does not provide legal advice.
